emails.subject: Letter of Credit
emails.body: Attached is the form of Letter of Credit you requested. Also, I am still working to get that info from London on the margin funds and securities. They are working on it so I hope to get it to you soon. They are the only holdout.

emails.subject: Letter of Credit
emails.body: Attached is the form of Letter of Credit you requested. Also, I am still working to get that info from London on the margin funds and securities. They are working on it so I hope to get it to you soon. They are the only holdout.

emails.subject: Re: Letter of Credit
emails.body: Re: Letter of Credit Thanks Tana. I know this project must at the absolute bottom of their priority list, so I'm happy to get what I can.

emails.subject: Re: Letter of Credit

emails.subject: Re: Letter of Credit
emails.body: Re: Letter of Credit It wasn't at the bottom of my list, but it appears it was at the bottom of London's list.
